# Eric Caskey — ericcaskey.com

> Senior Software Engineer at Amazon. Principal-scope platform engineer.
> Owns ICON Monitoring (fleet-wide infrastructure observability across
> the Amazon fleet) and a workflow orchestration control plane running
> millions of executions across teams in Dublin, Seattle, San Jose,
> New York, Bangalore, and Sydney. Former Cloud Engineering & SRE at
> Prudential Financial. NJ Army National Guard veteran.

## About
- [About](https://ericcaskey.com/about): Full career narrative, values,
  and mission.

## Work
- [Engineering Work](https://ericcaskey.com/work): Summary of platform
  engineering scope. See caskeycoding.com for full case studies and
  projects.
